title: Bhagavad Gita, Chapter 9: The Royal Secret
description: Chapter 9 of the Bhagavad Gita: Krishna reveals the most secret teaching: he pervades the entire cosmos yet is not contained by it.
introduction: Chapter 9 of the Bhagavad Gita: Krishna reveals the most secret teaching: he pervades the entire cosmos yet is not contained by it.

translation.text: By me, in my unmanifest form, this entire universe is pervaded. All beings exist in me, but I do not dwell in them.
